---
title: "wbc population"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-13"
---
---
title: "Untitled"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2025-11-10"
---
```{r, echo=FALSE}
 library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
Blood_count <- read_excel("smears_analysis_r_updated14.xlsx")
```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    `total_cell` = `[Cells] c/ml`
  )

```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    `Shark_Id` = `Sharks Id`
  )
```



```{r, echo=FALSE}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    total_count        = `total count`
  )
```


```{r}
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe),
    week_factor = factor(week),
    Shark_Id_factor = factor(Shark_Id)
  )

```


```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

# First, ensure columns are correctly renamed (if not already)
Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Lympho_wbc    = `Lympho_wbc%`,
    GT_wbc        = `GT_wbc%`,
    FE_wbc        = `FE_wbc%`,
    CE_wbc        = `CE_wbc%`,
    Neutro_wbc    = `Neutro_wbc%`,
    Monocyte_wbc  = `Monocyte_wbc%`,
    Basophil_wbc  = `basophil_wbc%`
  )

```

```{r}
# Filter week 4 and select relevant columns
week4_data <- Blood_count %>%
  filter(week_factor == 4) %>%
  dplyr::select(Groupe_factor, Lympho_wbc, GT_wbc, CE_wbc, FE_wbc, Neutro_wbc, Monocyte_wbc, Basophil_wbc)

# Pivot to long format
week4_long <- week4_data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = Lympho_wbc:Basophil_wbc,
    names_to = "Leukocyte",
    values_to = "Percentage"
  )

# Specify the order of leukocytes
week4_long$Leukocyte <- factor(week4_long$Leukocyte, 
                               levels = c("Lympho_wbc", "GT_wbc", "CE_wbc", "FE_wbc", "Neutro_wbc", "Monocyte_wbc", "Basophil_wbc"))

# Plot
ggplot(week4_long, aes(x = Leukocyte, y = Percentage, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "summary", fun = "mean", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(stat = "summary", fun.data = mean_se, 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.2, color = "red") +
   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#009E73", "Winter" = "#56B4E9", "Summer" = "#D55")) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "Lympho_wbc" = "Lymphocyte",
      "GT_wbc" = "GT",
      "CE_wbc" = "CE",
      "FE_wbc" = "FE",
      "Neutro_wbc" = "Neutrophil",
      "Monocyte_wbc" = "Monocyte",
      "Basophil_wbc" = "Basophil"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Leukocyte % by Treatment (Week 4)",
    x = "Leukocyte Type",
    y = "Mean % of WBC",
    fill = "Treatment Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```
```{r}
# Filter week 4 and select relevant columns
week6_data <- Blood_count %>%
  filter(week_factor == 6) %>%
  dplyr::select(Groupe_factor, Lympho_wbc, GT_wbc, CE_wbc, FE_wbc, Neutro_wbc, Monocyte_wbc, Basophil_wbc)

# Pivot to long format
week6_long <- week6_data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = Lympho_wbc:Basophil_wbc,
    names_to = "Leukocyte",
    values_to = "Percentage"
  )
# Specify the order of leukocytes
week6_long$Leukocyte <- factor(week6_long$Leukocyte, 
                               levels = c("Lympho_wbc", "GT_wbc", "CE_wbc", "FE_wbc", "Neutro_wbc", "Monocyte_wbc", "Basophil_wbc"))

# Plot
ggplot(week6_long, aes(x = Leukocyte, y = Percentage, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "summary", fun = "mean", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(stat = "summary", fun.data = mean_se, 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.2, color = "red") +
   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#009E73", "Winter" = "#56B4E9", "Summer" = "#D55")) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "Lympho_wbc" = "Lymphocyte",
      "GT_wbc" = "GT",
      "CE_wbc" = "CE",
      "FE_wbc" = "FE",
      "Neutro_wbc" = "Neutrophil",
      "Monocyte_wbc" = "Monocyte",
      "Basophil_wbc" = "Basophil"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Leukocyte % by Treatment (Week 6)",
    x = "Leukocyte Type",
    y = "Mean % of WBC",
    fill = "Treatment Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```

```{r}

# Filter week 4 and select relevant columns
week8_data <- Blood_count %>%
  filter(week_factor == 8) %>%
  dplyr::select(Groupe_factor, Lympho_wbc, GT_wbc, CE_wbc, FE_wbc, Neutro_wbc, Monocyte_wbc, Basophil_wbc)

# Pivot to long format
week8_long <- week8_data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = Lympho_wbc:Basophil_wbc,
    names_to = "Leukocyte",
    values_to = "Percentage"
  )

# Specify the order of leukocytes
week8_long$Leukocyte <- factor(week8_long$Leukocyte, 
                               levels = c("Lympho_wbc", "GT_wbc", "CE_wbc", "FE_wbc", "Neutro_wbc", "Monocyte_wbc", "Basophil_wbc"))


# Plot
ggplot(week8_long, aes(x = Leukocyte, y = Percentage, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "summary", fun = "mean", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(stat = "summary", fun.data = mean_se, 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.2, color = "red") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Control" = "#009E73", "Winter" = "#56B4E9", "Summer" = "#D55")) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "Lympho_wbc" = "Lymphocyte",
      "GT_wbc" = "GT",
      "CE_wbc" = "CE",
      "FE_wbc" = "FE",
      "Neutro_wbc" = "Neutrophil",
      "Monocyte_wbc" = "Monocyte",
      "Basophil_wbc" = "Basophil"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Leukocyte % by Treatment (Week 8)",
    x = "Leukocyte Type",
    y = "Mean % of WBC",
    fill = "Treatment Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

```





```{r}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(DHARMa)

Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe),
    week_factor = factor(week),
    Sex_factor = factor(Sex),
    Shark_Id_factor = factor(Shark_Id)
  )

# Ensure group names are consistent
Blood_count$Groupe[Blood_count$Groupe == "Contrôle"] <- "Control"
custom_colors <- c("Control" = "#009E73", "Winter" = "#56B4E9", "Summer" = "#D55")

# ============================
# 1. Lymphocytes
# ============================
lmm_CE_wbc <- lmer(CE_wbc ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1 | Shark_Id_factor),
                   data = Blood_count)
summary(lmm_CE_wbc)

# Post-hoc
emms_CE_wbc <- emmeans(lmm_CE_wbc, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs(emms_CE_wbc, adjust = "tukey")
emms_CE_wbc_df <- as.data.frame(emms_CE_wbc)

# Plot
p_CE_wbc<- ggplot(emms_CE_wbc_df, aes(x = week_factor, y = emmean, group = Groupe_factor, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(title = "CE_wbc (%)", x = "Week", y = "Predicted % WBC", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_CE_wbc)

# Diagnostics
res_CE_wbc <- simulateResiduals(lmm_CE_wbc, n = 1000)
plot(res_CE_wbc)
testUniformity(res_CE_wbc)
testDispersion(res_CE_wbc)
testZeroInflation(res_CE_wbc)
```

```{r}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(DHARMa)

Blood_count <- Blood_count %>%
  mutate(
    Groupe_factor = factor(Groupe),
    week_factor = factor(week),
    Sex_factor = factor(Sex),
    Shark_Id_factor = factor(Shark_Id)
  )

# Ensure group names are consistent
Blood_count$Groupe[Blood_count$Groupe == "Contrôle"] <- "Control"
custom_colors <- c("Control" = "#009E73", "Winter" = "#56B4E9", "Summer" = "#D55")

# ============================
# 1. Lymphocytes
# ============================
lmm_lympho <- lmer(Lympho_wbc ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1 | Shark_Id_factor),
                   data = Blood_count)
summary(lmm_lympho)

# Post-hoc
emms_lympho <- emmeans(lmm_lympho, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs(emms_lympho, adjust = "tukey")
emms_lympho_df <- as.data.frame(emms_lympho)





# Plot
p_lympho <- ggplot(emms_lympho_df, aes(x = week_factor, y = emmean, group = Groupe_factor, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(title = "Lymphocytes (%)", x = "Week", y = "Predicted % WBC", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_lympho)

# Diagnostics
res_lympho <- simulateResiduals(lmm_lympho, n = 1000)
plot(res_lympho)
testUniformity(res_lympho)
testDispersion(res_lympho)
testZeroInflation(res_lympho)

# ============================
# 2. GT
# ============================
lmm_gt <- lmer(GT_wbc ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1 | Shark_Id_factor),
               data = Blood_count)
summary(lmm_gt)

emms_gt <- emmeans(lmm_gt, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs(emms_gt, adjust = "tukey")
emms_gt_df <- as.data.frame(emms_gt)

overall_groups_gt <- pairs(emmeans(lmm_gt, ~ Groupe_factor), adjust = "tukey")
overall_weeks_gt <- pairs(emmeans(lmm_gt, ~ week_factor), adjust = "tukey")

p_gt <- ggplot(emms_gt_df, aes(x = week_factor, y = emmean, group = Groupe_factor, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(title = "GT (%)", x = "Week", y = "Predicted % WBC", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_gt)

res_gt <- simulateResiduals(lmm_gt, n = 1000)
plot(res_gt)
testUniformity(res_gt)
testDispersion(res_gt)
testZeroInflation(res_gt)

# ============================
# 3. FE
# ============================
lmm_fe <- lmer(FE_wbc ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1 | Shark_Id_factor),
               data = Blood_count)
summary(lmm_fe)

emms_fe <- emmeans(lmm_fe, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs(emms_fe, adjust = "tukey")
emms_fe_df <- as.data.frame(emms_fe)

p_fe <- ggplot(emms_fe_df, aes(x = week_factor, y = emmean, group = Groupe_factor, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(title = "FE (%)", x = "Week", y = "Predicted % WBC", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_fe)

res_fe <- simulateResiduals(lmm_fe, n = 1000)
plot(res_fe)
testUniformity(res_fe)
testDispersion(res_fe)
testZeroInflation(res_fe)
# --- Compute emmeans and pairwise comparisons for FE ---
emms_fe <- emmeans(lmm_fe, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs_fe <- pairs(emms_fe, adjust = "tukey")

overall_groups_fe <- pairs(emmeans(lmm_fe, ~ Groupe_factor), adjust = "tukey")
overall_weeks_fe <- pairs(emmeans(lmm_fe, ~ week_factor), adjust = "tukey")

# --- Convert to data frame ---
pairs_fe_df <- as.data.frame(pairs_fe)

# --- Optional: add direction and significance ---
pairs_fe_df <- pairs_fe_df %>%
  mutate(
    Direction = ifelse(estimate > 0, "First > Second", "Second > First"),
    Significance = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
  )

# --- Export to Excel ---
library(writexl)
write_xlsx(pairs_fe_df, "FE_Pairwise_Comparisons.xlsx")


library(writexl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# --- Function to prepare pairwise df for Excel ---
prepare_emmeans_df <- function(emms_obj) {
  df <- as.data.frame(pairs(emms_obj, adjust = "tukey"))
  
  # Split contrast into Group1/Week1 and Group2/Week2
  df <- df %>%
    separate(contrast, into = c("Group1", "Week1", "minus", "Group2", "Week2"), sep = " ") %>%
    select(-minus) %>%
    mutate(
      Direction = ifelse(estimate > 0, "Group1 > Group2", "Group2 > Group1"),
      Significant = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
    )
  
  return(df)
}

# --- Example 1: Lymphocytes ---
lympho_pairs_df <- prepare_emmeans_df(emms_lympho)
write_xlsx(lympho_pairs_df, "Lymphocytes_Pairwise.xlsx")

# --- Example 2: Granulocytes (GT) ---
gt_pairs_df <- prepare_emmeans_df(emms_gt)
write_xlsx(gt_pairs_df, "GT_Pairwise.xlsx")


# 3. CE
# ============================
lmm_ce <- lmer(CE_wbc ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1 | Shark_Id_factor),
               data = Blood_count)
summary(lmm_ce)

emms_ce <- emmeans(lmm_ce, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs(emms_ce, adjust = "tukey")
emms_ce_df <- as.data.frame(emms_ce)

overall_groups_ce <- pairs(emmeans(lmm_ce, ~ Groupe_factor), adjust = "tukey")
overall_weeks_ce <- pairs(emmeans(lmm_ce, ~ week_factor), adjust = "tukey")

p_ce <- ggplot(emms_ce_df, aes(x = week_factor, y = emmean, group = Groupe_factor, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(title = "CE (%)", x = "Week", y = "Predicted % WBC", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_ce)

res_ce <- simulateResiduals(lmm_ce, n = 1000)
plot(res_fe)
testUniformity(res_ce)
testDispersion(res_ce)
testZeroInflation(res_ce)
# --- Compute emmeans and pairwise comparisons for FE ---
emms_ce <- emmeans(lmm_ce, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs_ce <- pairs(emms_ce, adjust = "tukey")

# --- Convert to data frame ---
pairs_ce_df <- as.data.frame(pairs_ce)

# --- Optional: add direction and significance ---
pairs_ce_df <- pairs_ce_df %>%
  mutate(
    Direction = ifelse(estimate > 0, "First > Second", "Second > First"),
    Significance = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
  )

# --- Export to Excel ---
library(writexl)
write_xlsx(pairs_ce_df, "CE_Pairwise_Comparisons.xlsx")


```



```{r}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(DHARMa)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)

# ============================
# 1. Fit LMM for Monocytes
# ============================
lmm_mono <- lmer(Monocyte_wbc ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1 | Shark_Id_factor),
                 data = Blood_count)

# Summary
summary(lmm_mono)

# ============================
# 2. Residual diagnostics
# ============================
res_mono <- simulateResiduals(lmm_mono, n = 1000)
plot(res_mono)                # Visual check
testUniformity(res_mono)      # Normality
testDispersion(res_mono)      # Overdispersion
testZeroInflation(res_mono)   # Zero inflation

# ============================
# 3. Post-hoc comparisons
# ============================
emms_mono <- emmeans(lmm_mono, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)

# Function to create Excel-friendly table
prepare_emmeans_df <- function(emms_obj) {
  df <- as.data.frame(pairs(emms_obj, adjust = "tukey"))
  
  # Split contrast into Group1/Week1 and Group2/Week2
  df <- df %>%
    separate(contrast, into = c("Group1", "Week1", "minus", "Group2", "Week2"), sep = " ") %>%
    select(-minus) %>%
    mutate(
      Direction = ifelse(estimate > 0, "Group1 > Group2", "Group2 > Group1"),
      Significant = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
    )
  
  return(df)
}

# Prepare pairwise table
mono_pairs_df <- prepare_emmeans_df(emms_mono)

# ============================
# 4. Export to Excel
# ============================
write_xlsx(mono_pairs_df, "Monocytes_Pairwise.xlsx")

```




```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(emmeans)

# --- 1. Get predicted means and convert to data frames ---
emms_lympho <- as.data.frame(emmeans(lmm_lympho, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor))
emms_GT     <- as.data.frame(emmeans(lmm_gt,     ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor))
emms_FE     <- as.data.frame(emmeans(lmm_fe,     ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor))
emms_mono     <- as.data.frame(emmeans(lmm_mono,     ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor))
# --- 2. Add a column indicating the leukocyte ---
emms_lympho$Leukocyte <- "Lymphocytes"
emms_GT$Leukocyte     <- "GT"
emms_FE$Leukocyte     <- "FE"
emms_mono$Leukocyte     <- "Monocyte"
# --- 3. Combine all into one dataframe ---
emms_all <- bind_rows(emms_lympho, emms_GT, emms_FE, emms_mono)

emms_all$Leukocyte <- factor(emms_all$Leukocyte, levels = c("Lymphocytes", "GT", "FE", "Monocyte"))
# --- 4. Plot with facet ---
custom_colors <- c("Control" = "#009E73", "Winter" = "#56B4E9", "Summer" = "#D55")

ggplot(emms_all, aes(x = week_factor, y = emmean, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~Leukocyte, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "Week",
    y = "Predicted % of WBC",
    fill = "Group",
    title = "Predicted leukocyte percentages by group and week"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))

```
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(broom.mixed)

# --- 1. Lymphocytes ---
lympho_table <- tidy(lmm_lympho) %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  select(term, estimate, std.error, df, statistic, p.value)

# --- 2. GT ---
GT_table <- tidy(lmm_gt) %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  select(term, estimate, std.error, df, statistic, p.value)

# --- 3. FE ---
FE_table <- tidy(lmm_fe) %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  select(term, estimate, std.error, df, statistic, p.value)

# --- 4. Display the tables ---
lympho_table
GT_table
FE_table

```
```{r}
colnames(Blood_count)
```
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(openxlsx)

# Columns of interest
cols_to_summarize <- c("[Rbc]", "[wbc]", "[Lympho]", "[Granulocyte]", 
                       "[Thrombo]", "[abnormal]", "[immature]", "[mitosis]")

# Summarize mean ± SD in scientific notation
summary_table <- Blood_count %>%
  group_by(Groupe_factor, week_factor) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(all_of(cols_to_summarize)), 
               list(~ paste0(format(mean(., na.rm = TRUE), scientific = TRUE, digits = 3),
                             " ± ", 
                             format(sd(., na.rm = TRUE), scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)))) %>%
  ungroup()

# View the table
print(summary_table)

# Export to Excel
write.xlsx(summary_table, "Blood_count_summary_full_scientific.xlsx", rowNames = FALSE)
```
```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(car)

cols_to_test <- c("[Rbc]", "[wbc]", "[Lympho]", "[Granulocyte]", 
                  "[Thrombo]", "[abnormal]", "[immature]", "[mitosis]")

weeks_to_test <- c(4, 6, 8)

for (wk in weeks_to_test) {
  cat("\n\n====================================\n")
  cat("            WEEK", wk, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")
  
  week_data <- Blood_count %>%
    filter(week_factor == wk) %>%
    dplyr::select(Groupe_factor, all_of(cols_to_test))
  
  for (col in cols_to_test) {
    cat("\n-----------------------------\n")
    cat("Variable:", col, "\n")
    cat("-----------------------------\n")
    
    temp <- week_data %>%
      dplyr::select(Groupe_factor, all_of(col)) %>%
      drop_na()
    
    # --- SAFE Shapiro test (per group) ---
    cat("\nShapiro-Wilk Test (per group):\n")
    groups <- unique(temp$Groupe_factor)
    for (g in groups) {
      vec <- temp[temp$Groupe_factor == g, ][[col]]
      vec <- vec[!is.na(vec)]
      if (length(vec) < 3) {
        cat(" Group", g, ": Not enough data (<3 values)\n")
      } else if (var(vec) == 0) {
        cat(" Group", g, ": All values identical → Shapiro cannot be computed\n")
      } else {
        sh <- tryCatch(shapiro.test(vec), error = function(e) e)
        if (inherits(sh, "error")) {
          cat(" Group", g, ": Shapiro failed:", sh$message, "\n")
        } else {
          cat(" Group", g, ": p =", format(sh$p.value, digits = 4), "\n")
        }
      }
    }
    
    # --- SAFE Levene test (avoid data-mask / dplyr issues) ---
    cat("\nLevene’s Test for equal variances:\n")
    
    # Build a list of numeric vectors by group using base split()
    grp_list <- split(temp[[col]], temp$Groupe_factor)
    # compute group variances safely (NA if <2 observations)
    grp_vars <- sapply(grp_list, function(x) {
      x <- x[!is.na(x)]
      if (length(x) < 2) return(NA_real_)
      var(x)
    })
    
    # Count groups with finite variance > 0 (eligible for Levene)
    eligible <- sum(!is.na(grp_vars) & grp_vars > 0)
    
    if (eligible < 2) {
      cat(" Levene skipped: need at least two groups with >1 non-missing observation and variance > 0.\n")
    } else {
      # Run leveneTest on the temp data frame using the column name safely
      # Use formula with backticks in case of special characters in colname
      fmla <- as.formula(paste0("`", col, "` ~ Groupe_factor"))
      lev <- tryCatch(leveneTest(fmla, data = temp), error = function(e) e)
      if (inherits(lev, "error")) {
        cat(" Levene test failed:", lev$message, "\n")
      } else {
        print(lev)
      }
    }
  }
}

cat("\n\n✅ All normality + variance tests completed safely.\n")

```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rstatix)
library(openxlsx)  # for Excel export

cols_to_test <- c("[Rbc]", "[wbc]", "[Lympho]", "[Granulocyte]",
                  "[Thrombo]", "[abnormal]", "[immature]", "[mitosis]")

weeks_to_test <- c(4, 6, 8)

# Create empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

for (wk in weeks_to_test) {
  
  week_data <- Blood_count %>%
    filter(week_factor == wk) %>%
    dplyr::select(Groupe_factor, all_of(cols_to_test))
  
  for (col in cols_to_test) {
    
    # Kruskal-Wallis test (safe)
    kw <- tryCatch(
      kruskal_test(week_data, as.formula(paste0("`", col, "` ~ Groupe_factor"))),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    
    if (!is.null(kw)) {
      results_list[[length(results_list)+1]] <- tibble(
        Variable = col,
        Week = wk,
        Kruskal_Wallis_p = kw$p,
        Significant = ifelse(kw$p < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
      )
    } else {
      results_list[[length(results_list)+1]] <- tibble(
        Variable = col,
        Week = wk,
        Kruskal_Wallis_p = NA,
        Significant = "Error"
      )
    }
    
  }
}

# Combine all results into one table
results_table <- bind_rows(results_list)

# View table
print(results_table)

# Export to Excel
write.xlsx(results_table, "Blood_count_KW_summary.xlsx", rowNames = FALSE)

cat("\n✅ Kruskal-Wallis summary table exported to Excel.\n")

```
```{r}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(DHARMa)

var_name <- "[Rbc]"
display_name <- "RBC count"  # clean name for plots/titles

# --- Fit LMM ---
lmm_rbc <- lmer(as.formula(paste0("`", var_name, "` ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1 | Shark_Id_factor)")),
                data = Blood_count)


# --- Summary ---
summary(lmm_rbc)

# --- Post-hoc comparisons ---
emms_rbc <- emmeans(lmm_rbc, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs(emms_rbc, adjust = "tukey")

# --- Prepare for plotting ---
emms_rbc_df <- as.data.frame(emms_rbc)

custom_colors <- c("Control" = "#009E73", "Winter" = "#56B4E9", "Summer" = "#D55")

p_rbc <- ggplot(emms_rbc_df, aes(x = week_factor, y = emmean, group = Groupe_factor, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted [Rbc] (mean ± SE)",
    x = "Week",
    y = "[Rbc]",
    fill = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_rbc)

# --- Residual diagnostics ---
res_rbc <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = lmm_rbc, n = 1000)
plot(res_rbc)
testUniformity(res_rbc)
testDispersion(res_rbc)
testZeroInflation(res_rbc)
anova(lmm_rbc)
# --- Compute emmeans and pairs ---
emms_rbc <- emmeans(lmm_rbc, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs_rbc <- pairs(emms_rbc, adjust = "tukey")

# --- Convert to data frame ---
pairs_rbc_df <- as.data.frame(pairs_rbc)

# --- Add columns for direction and significance ---
pairs_rbc_df <- pairs_rbc_df %>%
  mutate(
    Direction = ifelse(estimate > 0, "First > Second", "Second > First"),
    Significance = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
  )

# --- Export to Excel ---
library(writexl)
write_xlsx(pairs_rbc_df, "RBC_Pairwise_Comparisons.xlsx")

```
```{r}
library(dplyr)

Blood_count %>%
  group_by(Groupe_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_ratio = mean("[Rbc]", na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_ratio = sd("[Rbc]", na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )
```


```{r}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(DHARMa)

# Variable to model
var_name <- "[wbc]"
display_name <- "WBC count"  # clean name for plots/titles

# --- Fit LMM ---
lmm_wbc <- lmer(as.formula(paste0("`", var_name, "` ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1 | Shark_Id_factor)")),
                data = Blood_count)

# --- Summary ---
summary(lmm_wbc)

# --- Post-hoc comparisons ---
emms_wbc <- emmeans(lmm_wbc, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs(emms_wbc, adjust = "tukey")

# --- Prepare for plotting ---
emms_wbc_df <- as.data.frame(emms_wbc)

custom_colors <- c("Control" = "#009E73", "Winter" = "#56B4E9", "Summer" = "#D55")

p_wbc <- ggplot(emms_wbc_df, aes(x = week_factor, y = emmean, group = Groupe_factor, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Predicted", display_name, "(mean ± SE)"),
    x = "Week",
    y = display_name,
    fill = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_wbc)
anova(lmm_wbc)
# --- Residual diagnostics ---
res_wbc <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = lmm_wbc, n = 1000)
plot(res_wbc)
testUniformity(res_wbc)
testDispersion(res_wbc)
testZeroInflation(res_wbc)
# --- Compute emmeans and pairs for WBC ---
emms_wbc <- emmeans(lmm_wbc, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs_wbc <- pairs(emms_wbc, adjust = "tukey")

# --- Convert to data frame ---
pairs_wbc_df <- as.data.frame(pairs_wbc)

# --- Optional: add columns for direction and significance ---
pairs_wbc_df <- pairs_wbc_df %>%
  mutate(
    Direction = ifelse(estimate > 0, "First > Second", "Second > First"),
    Significance = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
  )

# --- Export to Excel ---
library(writexl)
write_xlsx(pairs_wbc_df, "WBC_Pairwise_Comparisons.xlsx")

```
```{r}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(DHARMa)

var_name <- "[Thrombo]"
display_name <- "Thrombocyte count"

# Fit LMM
lmm_thrombo <- lmer(as.formula(paste0("`", var_name, "` ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor + Sex_factor + (1 | Shark_Id_factor)")),
                    data = Blood_count)

# Summary
summary(lmm_thrombo)

# Post-hoc comparisons
emms_thrombo <- emmeans(lmm_thrombo, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs(emms_thrombo, adjust = "tukey")

# Prepare for plotting
emms_df <- as.data.frame(emms_thrombo)

custom_colors <- c("Control" = "#009E73", "Winter" = "#56B4E9", "Summer" = "#D55")

p <- ggplot(emms_df, aes(x = week_factor, y = emmean, group = Groupe_factor, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Predicted", display_name, "(mean ± SE)"),
    x = "Week",
    y = display_name,
    fill = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p)
anova(lmm_thrombo)
# Residual diagnostics
res <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = lmm_thrombo, n = 1000)
plot(res)
testUniformity(res)
testDispersion(res)
testZeroInflation(res)
# --- Compute emmeans and pairs for Thrombocytes ---
emms_thrombo <- emmeans(lmm_thrombo, ~ Groupe_factor * week_factor)
pairs_thrombo <- pairs(emms_thrombo, adjust = "tukey")

# --- Convert to data frame ---
pairs_thrombo_df <- as.data.frame(pairs_thrombo)

# --- Optional: add columns for direction and significance ---
pairs_thrombo_df <- pairs_thrombo_df %>%
  mutate(
    Direction = ifelse(estimate > 0, "First > Second", "Second > First"),
    Significance = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
  )

# --- Export to Excel ---
library(writexl)
write_xlsx(pairs_thrombo_df, "Thrombocyte_Pairwise_Comparisons.xlsx")

```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rstatix)

var <- "[mitosis]"

# Ensure numeric
Blood_count[[var]] <- as.numeric(Blood_count[[var]])

cat("\n===== Overall Kruskal–Wallis Test Across Groups (All Weeks) =====\n")
kw_overall <- kruskal_test(Blood_count, as.formula(paste0("`", var, "` ~ Groupe_factor")))
print(kw_overall)

cat("\n===== Overall Pairwise Comparisons Across Groups (All Weeks) =====\n")
pairwise_overall <- Blood_count %>%
  dunn_test(as.formula(paste0("`", var, "` ~ Groupe_factor")), p.adjust.method = "bonferroni") %>%
  add_significance()
print(pairwise_overall)

# --- Week-by-week comparisons ---
weeks_to_test <- sort(unique(Blood_count$week_factor))

for(wk in weeks_to_test){
  week_data <- Blood_count %>%
    filter(week_factor == wk) %>%
    drop_na(`[mitosis]`)
  
  if(length(unique(week_data$Groupe_factor)) < 2){
    cat("\nWeek", wk, "- not enough groups to compare\n")
    next
  }
  
  cat("\n===== Week", wk, "Kruskal–Wallis Test =====\n")
  kw_week <- kruskal_test(week_data, as.formula(paste0("`", var, "` ~ Groupe_factor")))
  print(kw_week)
  
  cat("\n--- Week", wk, "Pairwise Comparisons (Dunn) ---\n")
  pairwise_week <- week_data %>%
    dunn_test(as.formula(paste0("`", var, "` ~ Groupe_factor")), p.adjust.method = "bonferroni") %>%
    add_significance()
  print(pairwise_week)
  
  # Optional: add fold-change relative to Winter median
  fold_week <- week_data %>%
    group_by(Groupe_factor) %>%
    summarise(median_val = median(`[mitosis]`, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    mutate(fold_vs_winter = median_val / median_val[Groupe_factor == "Winter"])
  cat("\n--- Week", wk, "Median & Fold-change vs Winter ---\n")
  print(fold_week)
}


```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rstatix)

var <- "[abnormal]"

cat("\n===== Kruskal–Wallis Tests for", var, "=====\n")

# --- 1. Between groups (all weeks combined) ---
kw_group <- kruskal_test(Blood_count, as.formula(paste0("`", var, "` ~ Groupe_factor")))
cat("\n--- Between Groups (all weeks combined) ---\n")
print(kw_group)

# --- 2. Between weeks (all groups combined) ---
kw_week <- kruskal_test(Blood_count, as.formula(paste0("`", var, "` ~ week_factor")))
cat("\n--- Between Weeks (all groups combined) ---\n")
print(kw_week)

# --- 3. Interaction-ish: within each week, compare groups ---
weeks_to_test <- sort(unique(Blood_count$week_factor))
cat("\n--- Group comparisons within each week ---\n")
for(wk in weeks_to_test){
  week_data <- Blood_count %>%
    filter(week_factor == wk) %>%
    select(Groupe_factor, all_of(var)) %>%
    drop_na()
  
  if(length(unique(week_data$Groupe_factor)) < 2){
    cat("Week", wk, "- not enough groups\n")
    next
  }
  
  cat("\nWeek", wk, ":\n")
  kw_week_group <- kruskal_test(week_data, as.formula(paste0("`", var, "` ~ Groupe_factor")))
  print(kw_week_group)
}

```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rstatix)

var <- "[immature]"

cat("\n===== Kruskal–Wallis Tests for", var, "=====\n")

# --- 1. Between groups (all weeks combined) ---
kw_group <- kruskal_test(Blood_count, as.formula(paste0("`", var, "` ~ Groupe_factor")))
cat("\n--- Between Groups (all weeks combined) ---\n")
print(kw_group)

# --- 2. Between weeks (all groups combined) ---
kw_week <- kruskal_test(Blood_count, as.formula(paste0("`", var, "` ~ week_factor")))
cat("\n--- Between Weeks (all groups combined) ---\n")
print(kw_week)

# --- 3. Interaction-ish: within each week, compare groups ---
weeks_to_test <- sort(unique(Blood_count$week_factor))
cat("\n--- Group comparisons within each week ---\n")
for(wk in weeks_to_test){
  week_data <- Blood_count %>%
    filter(week_factor == wk) %>%
    select(Groupe_factor, all_of(var)) %>%
    drop_na()
  
  if(length(unique(week_data$Groupe_factor)) < 2){
    cat("Week", wk, "- not enough groups\n")
    next
  }
  
  cat("\nWeek", wk, ":\n")
  kw_week_group <- kruskal_test(week_data, as.formula(paste0("`", var, "` ~ Groupe_factor")))
  print(kw_week_group)
}

```


```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr) # Explicitly load dplyr
library(ggplot2) # Explicitly load ggplot2

# --- 0. Data Preparation and Factor Definition FIX ---

# CRITICAL FIX 1: Change the name in the base character column
Blood_count$Groupe[Blood_count$Groupe == "Control"] <- "Static"

Blood_count <- Blood_count %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Shark_Id)) %>%
  mutate(
    week_factor = factor(week),
    # CRITICAL FIX 2: Define the plotting factor, enforcing Winter, Static, Summer order
    Groupe_factor = factor(
      Groupe, 
      # Using the final requested order: Winter, Static, Summer
      levels = c("Winter", "Static", "Summer") 
    )
    # Note: Assuming all *_wbc percentage columns are calculated prior to this script.
  )

# Define the final custom color palette (matching the factor order and established hex codes)
custom_colors <- c(
  "Winter" = "#6F9FCC",  # Winter color
  "Static" = "#D6C9AE",  # Static/Control color
  "Summer" = "#D97A66"   # Summer color (updated to D97A66 for consistency)
)


# --- Define Plotting Function ---

# This function creates a single bar plot for any given component, faceted by week
create_component_plot <- function(data, component_col, component_label, colors) {
  
  # Note: Backticks (` `) are required for column names with special characters like '%'
  # The column name is passed as a string, and needs to be converted to a symbol for aes
  y_var_sym <- sym(component_col)
  
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(week_factor), y = !!y_var_sym, fill = Groupe_factor)) +
    
    # Calculate and plot the mean bar
    geom_bar(
      stat = "summary",
      fun = "mean",
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
      color = "black"
    )  +
    # Add error bars (SEM)
    geom_errorbar(
      stat = "summary",
      fun.data = mean_se,
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), # Ensure position is consistent
      width = 0.2,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    
    
    # Apply the custom colors
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
    
    # Labels and theming
    labs(
      title = "",
      x = "", 
      y = paste0("Mean ", component_label, " %"),
      fill = "" 
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = c("4" = "Week 4", "6" = "Week 6", "8" = "Week 8")) +
    
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), # Show X-axis tick labels
      axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  return(p)
}
# --------------------------------------------------------------------
# --- 2. Generate and Print Plots ---
# --------------------------------------------------------------------

# 1. Lymphocyte %
plot_lympho <- create_component_plot(Blood_count, "Lympho_wbc", "Lymphocyte", custom_colors)
print(plot_lympho)

# 3. GT %
plot_gt <- create_component_plot(Blood_count, "GT_wbc", "GT", custom_colors)
print(plot_gt)

# 4. FE %
plot_fe <- create_component_plot(Blood_count, "FE_wbc", "FE", custom_colors)
print(plot_fe)

# 5. CE %
plot_ce <- create_component_plot(Blood_count, "CE_wbc", "CE", custom_colors)
print(plot_ce)

# 6. Monocyte %
plot_monocyte <- create_component_plot(Blood_count, "Monocyte_wbc", "Monocyte", custom_colors)
print(plot_monocyte)

# 7 Neutro
plot_neutrophil <- create_component_plot(Blood_count, "Neutro_wbc", "Neutrophil", custom_colors)
print(plot_neutrophil)

```
